likely_range_or_issue: Around ±15–25% around central reduced-form cost points, especially after 2035 where system integration choices matter.
priority_sensitivity_test: Compare policy_frontier vs deep_clean_firmed costs and test higher/lower firming cost.

likely_range_or_issue: Near-term benchmark relatively strong; long-run intensity depends on residual gas, storage and curtailment assumptions.
priority_sensitivity_test: Use 2050 grid intensity of 0.02 versus 0.05 tCO2e/MWh and compare model behavior.

parameter_family: Building service efficiency and electrification coefficients
likely_range_or_issue: Broad direction is robust, but service-bundle coefficients hide end-use heterogeneity and climate-zone effects.
priority_sensitivity_test: Vary final-energy intensity of electrified and deep-electric states by ±15%.

parameter_family: Passenger road service cost and stock-average energy intensity
likely_range_or_issue: Aggregate incumbent calibration is strong; future cost and drivetrain mix remain sensitive to vehicle price decline and stock turnover.
priority_sensitivity_test: Vary BEV cost decline and BEV max-share bounds.

parameter_family: Road freight electrification and hydrogen coefficients
likely_range_or_issue: Australia-wide freight-task heterogeneity is large; BEV and H2 coefficients are approximate national averages.
priority_sensitivity_test: Test BEV energy coefficient ±25% and H2 availability/cost bounds.

likely_range_or_issue: Temperature-band abstraction loses substantial subsector specificity.
priority_sensitivity_test: Stress-test electrified and low-carbon-fuel shares; compare against leaving only fossil + one clean option.

parameter_family: Steel route costs and feasible shares
likely_range_or_issue: Hydrogen, CCS and scrap-supply assumptions dominate. Australian route-specific evidence remains sparse.
priority_sensitivity_test: Vary H2 route non-commodity cost by ±20%, H2 input coefficient ±15%, and scrap-EAF max-share.

parameter_family: Cement CCS rollout and low-clinker pathway depth
likely_range_or_issue: Low-clinker and alternative-fuel pathway is relatively well supported; CCS timing and cost less so.
priority_sensitivity_test: Run with and without CCS_deep state; vary clinker factor floor and sequestration service cost.

likely_range_or_issue: Energy and emissions totals are anchored, but bundle allocation and mitigation costs are highly aggregated.
priority_sensitivity_test: Treat agriculture mitigation states as optional and vary process-emission reductions by ±20%.

likely_range_or_issue: Both cost and feasible activity are highly uncertain, especially for DACCS and durable storage infrastructure.
priority_sensitivity_test: Disable DACCS in core runs; vary land-sequestration max_activity and cost separately.
